INSERT INTO produkte(datum, org_ID, namePrd, artikelNrPrd, custom1, custom2, custom3, custom4, custom5, custom6, anl01_ID, anl02_ID, anl03_ID, anl04_ID, anl05_ID, anl06_ID, anl07_ID, anl08_ID, anl09_ID, gruppenID, deleted, archiviert) VALUES (getdate(), '5', 'Test 57D1', 'Test 57D1', 'fg', 'arg1', 'T5', '', 'test1', 'test1', '1098', '76', '77', '', '', '', '', '', '', 1,'false','false')
